text: Light gel texture but still moisturizing. My dry skin felt calm and the fragrance free formula did not sting.
Great barrier cream for winter. It can feel a little sticky under makeup.
The watery texture absorbs fast and helped with redness. Very gentle for sensitive skin.
Gentle but not hydrating enough for dry patches. I needed another moisturizer.
Matte finish is excellent for oily skin and there is no white cast, but the scent is noticeable.
